function e(e,t){if(!{}.hasOwnProperty.call(e,t))throw TypeError(`attempted to use private field on non-instance`);return e}var t=0;function n(e){return`__private_`+ t+++`_`+e}function r(e){return a(e){if(Array.isArray(e))return{arrayValue:{values:e.map(e=>a(e))}};switch(typeof e){case`boolean`:return{boolValue:!!e};case`number`:return{doubleValue:Number(e)};case`string`:default:return{stringValue:String(e)}}}var o=1,s=c(5,2,12);function c(e,t,n){let r=[0];for(let i=0;i<n;i++){let n=Math.floor(e*t**i);r.push(n)}return r}var l=n(`exporter`),u=n(`attributes`),d=n(`metrics`),f=n(`logs`),p=class{constructor({exporter:t,attributes:n}){Object.defineProperty(this,l,{writable:!0,value:void h(e,t){let{name:n,value:i,unit:a,timeUnixNano:s,attributes:c,scale:l}=t;e[n]||={name:n,unit:a||`1`,exponentialHistogram:{aggregationTemporality:o,dataPoints:[]}};let 0,userAgent:``,languages:[],plugins:[],sendBeacon:void 0}:{get webdriver(){return navigator[Z(538)]},get userAgent(){return navigator[Z(586)]},get languages(){return navigator[Z(602)]},get plugins(){return navigator[Z(502)]},sendBeacon:navigator[Z(517)]?.[Z(634)](navigator)},window,screen,performance:typeof performance===Z(638)?void 0:performance}}function V(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return!1;let t=!1,n=null;for(let r of e){if(n===null){n=r.s;continue}if(Math[Z(464)](r.s-n)>5e-4){t=!0;break}n=r.s}return t}function H(e){if(e[Z(596)]<3)return 0;let t=0,n=0;for(let r=1;r<e[Z(596)];r++){let i=e[r-1],a=e[r],o=e[r+1];if(!i||!a||!o)continue;let s=Math[Z(515)](a.y-i.y,a.x-i.x),c=Math[Z(515)](o.y-a.y,o.x-a.x),l=Math[Z(464)](c-s);(l<Math.PI/12||l>2*Math.PI-Math.PI/12)&&t++,n++}return n>0?t/n:0}function U(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return{rhythmConsistency:0,jitter:0};let t=e[Z(512)]((e,t)=>e+t,0)/e[Z(596)],n=e[Z(512)]((e,n)=>(e??0)+((n??0)-t)**2,0)/e[Z(596)],r=Math[Z(532)](n);return{rhythmConsistency:r===0?1:Math[Z(501)](0,1-r/t),jitter:r/t}}function W(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return 0;let t=0;for(let n=1;n<e[Z(596)];n++){let r=e[n-1],i=e[n];Math[Z(464)](i.s-r.s)<=(i.s+r.s)/2*2&&t++,i[Z(593)]===r[Z(593)]&&t++}return t/((e[Z(596)]-1)*2)}function G(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return 0;let t=0;for(let n=1;n<e[Z(596)];n++){let r=e[n-1],i=e[n];Math[Z(464)](i.s-r.s)<=50&&t++}return t/(e[Z(596)]-1)}function K(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return 0;let t=0,n=0;for(let r=1;r<e[Z(596)];r++)e[r].t-e[r-1].t>=500&&e[r].t-n>=500&&(t++,n=e[r].t);return t}function q(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return 0;let t=0;for(let n=1;n<e[Z(596)];n++)e[n].t-e[n-1].t>=500&&t++;return t}function J(e){if(e[Z(596)]<2)return{speed:0,jitter:0};let t=e[Z(512)]((e,t)=>e+t.s,0)/e[Z(596)],n=e[Z(512)]((e,n)=>e+(n.s-t)**2,0)/(e[Z(596)]-1);return{speed:t,jitter:Math[Z(532)](n)}}function Y(e,t,n,r,i,a,o,s,c,l,u,d,f){let p=Math[Z(446)](1e3,e),m=Math[Z(446)](1e3,n),h=Math[Z(446)](1e3,a),g=Math[Z(446)](1e3,s),ee=Math[Z(446)](1e3,o),_=Math[Z(446)](1e3,c),v=[];if(t[Z(596)]>=3)for(let e=1;e<t[Z(596)];e++){let n=t[e].x-t[e-1].x,r=t[e].y-t[e-1].y,i=t[e].t-t[e-1].t;if(i===0)continue;let a=Math[Z(532)](n*n+r*r)/i;v[Z(559)]({s:a})}let y=V(v),b=H(t),{speed:x,jitter:S}=J(v),C=0,w=0;r[Z(596)]>1&&(C=new Set(r[Z(624)](e=>Math[Z(581)](e.x/20)+`,`+Math[Z(581)](e.y/20)))[Z(470)]>1?1:0,w=r[Z(512)]((e,t)=>e+t[Z(616)],0)/r[Z(596)]);let T=i[Z(512)]((e,t)=>(t[Z(630)]===null||e[Z(559)](t[Z(630)]),e),[]),{rhythmConsistency:E,jitter:D}=U(T),O=T[Z(596)]>0?T[Z(512)]((e,t)=>e+t,0)/T[Z(596)]:0,k=[];if(l[Z(596)]>=3)for(let e=1;e<l[Z(596)];e++){let t=Math[Z(464)](l[e].p-l[e-1].p),n=Math[Z(501)](1,l[e].t-l[e-1].t);if(n===0)continue;let r=t/n,i=l[e].p>l[e-1].p?Z(454):`up`;k[Z(559)]({s:r,dir:i,t:l[e].t})}let{speed:A,jitter:j}=J(k),M=W(k),N=Math[Z(446)](1e3,K(k)),{speed:P,jitter:F}=J(u),I=G(u),L=Math[Z(446)](1e3,q(u)),R=Math[Z(581)]((f-d)/1e3);return{ma:p,ca:m,ka:h,sa:g,ta:_,kba:ee,t:Math[Z(446)](3600,R),nm:y?1:0,ms:Q(b),mj:Q(S),msp:Q(x),vc:C,cp:Q(w),rc:Q(E),kj:Q(D),ki:Q(O),ss:Q(A),sj:Q(j),ssm:Q(M),sp:N,ts:Q(P),tj:Q(F),tp:L,tsm:Q(I)}}function X(e,t){let n=0;return(...r)=>{let i=typeof performance===Z(638)?Date[Z(568)]():performance[Z(568)]();i-n>=t&&(n=i,e(...r))}}function Z(e,t){let n=I();return Z=function(t,r){t-=432;let i=n[t];Z.oYxCdK===void 0&&(Z.pzqWnL=function(e){let t=``,n=``;for(let n=0,r,i,a=0;i=e.charAt(a++);~i&&(r=n%4?r*64+i:i,n++%4)&&(t+=String.fromCharCode(255&r>>(-2*n&6))))i=`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789+/=`.indexOf(i);for(let s?i=s:(i=Z.pzqWnL(i),e[o]=i),i},Z(e,t)}function Q(e){return Math[Z(631)](e*100)/100}function ne(e,t,n,r){let i={webdriver_detected:e?.wd===1||!1,bot_user_agent:e?.ua===0||!1,browser_environment_normal:e?.br===1||!1,canvas_fingerprint_normal:e?.cv===1||!1,natural_mouse_activity:!1,natural_click_patterns:!1,keyboard_activity:!1,scroll_activity:!1,touch_activity:!1,significant_page_time:!1,multiple_pages_visited:!1,session_duration_reasonable:!1};if(t.ma>0&&t.nm===1&&(i[Z(609)]=!0),t.ca>0&&t.vc===1&&(i[Z(467)]=!0),t.ka>0&&(i[Z(551)]=!0),t.sa>0&&(i[Z(488)]=!0),t.ta>0&&(i[Z(455)]=!0),t.t>30&&(i[Z(496)]=!0),n&&(n[Z(438)]>1&&(i[Z(635)]=!0),n[Z(531)]>60&&(i[Z(641)]=!0)),r){let Math[Z(532)]((t.x-e.x)**2+(t.y-e.y)**2)}[Z(618)](e){return n=T(1,$(e),t),r=JSON[Z(632)](n),i=this[Z(618)](this[Z(603)][Z(585)]);if(this[Z(453)][Z(623)][Z(517)]&&!this[Z(603)][Z(619)])try{let e=new Blob([r],{type:Z(443)});if(this[Z(453)][Z(623)][Z(517)](i,e)){this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(472)]=0,this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(620)]=Date[Z(568)]();return}}catch{}try{let e=await fetch(i,{method:Z(622),headers:{"Content-Type":Z(443)},body:r,credentials:Z(520),keepalive:!0});if(!e.ok)throw Error(Z(457)+e[Z(460)]);this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(472)]=0,this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(620)]=Date[Z(568)]()}catch{this[Z(461)](e,t)}}[Z(461)](e,t){if(!this[Z(493)][Z(535)]||this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(472)]>=this[Z(603)][Z(497)])return;let n=Math[Z(446)](1e3*2**this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(472)],3e4);this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(472)]++,this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(556)]=this[Z(453)][Z(482)][Z(511)](()=>{this[Z(493)][Z(535)]&&this[Z(517)](e,t)},n)}async[Z(529)](){if(!this[Z(493)][Z(535)])return;let e=Y(this[Z(493)][Z(542)],this[Z(493)][Z(615)],this[Z(493)][Z(590)],this[Z(493)][Z(597)],this[Z(493)][Z(598)],this[Z(493)][Z(613)],this[Z(493)][Z(462)],this[Z(493)][Z(500)],this[Z(493)][Z(436)],this[Z(493)][Z(574)],this[Z(493)][Z(469)],this[Z(493)][Z(546)],Date[Z(568)]()),t=ne(this[Z(493)][Z(528)],e,this[Z(493)][Z(591)],this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(640)]),n=re(t,this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(640)]),r=Date[Z(568)]()-this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(620)],i=r>=this[Z(603)][Z(475)];if(n||i){if(Date[Z(568)]()-this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(575)]<100){this[Z(537)](Z(612),!0);return}if(i&&!n&&this[Z(537)](Z(592)+Math[Z(631)](r/1e3)+Z(492),!0),n&&this[Z(603)][Z(636)]&&(this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(640)]?Object[Z(569)](t)[Z(554)](e=>{this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(640)][e],t[e]}):this[Z(537)](Z(485)),this[Z(493)][Z(591)]),this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(640)]=ie(t),this[Z(493)][Z(535)][Z(575)]=Date[Z(568)](),this[Z(510)](t),this[Z(603)][Z(465)]&&n)try{this[Z(603)][Z(465)]($(t))}catch(e){this[Z(478)][Z(560)](e,Z(628))}let e=Z(n?456:577);await this[Z(517)](t,e)}else this[Z(603)][Z(636)]}},se=(e,t)=>({libVersion:M,shopId:t||``,hostname:e[Z(482)]?.[Z(555)]?.[Z(627)]||``,url:e[Z(482)]?.[Z(555)]?.[Z(513)]||``,referrer:e[Z(563)]?.[Z(522)]||``,baseURI:e[Z(563)]?.[Z(545)]||``,sessionToken:j()||``,uniqueToken:A()||``}),ce=(e,t=B(),n=new x(L,R))=>{let r=new p({exporter:n,attributes:se(t,e?.[Z(458)])}),i=j(),a=i?N(i):void 0,o=new oe(new O(e?.[Z(636)]||!1,r,e?.[Z(518)]||1,a),e,t);return t[Z(563)][Z(610)]===Z(565)?t[Z(563)][Z(479)](Z(442),()=>o[Z(599)]()):o[Z(599)](),o};export{oe as ShopifyHumanSignal,Y as analyzeBehavior,H as calculateMouseStraightness,K as calculateScrollPauses,W as calculateScrollSmoothness,J as calculateSpeedAndJitter,q as calculateTouchPauses,G as calculateTouchSmoothness,U as calculateTypingConsistency,V as checkNaturalMouseMovement,T as createBeaconPayload,B as getDefaultBrowserAPI,re as hasSignificantChange,ce as initSHS,$ as packSignals,ne as processSignals,X as throttle,ae as unpackSignals};
//# sourceMappingURL=dist-BO9oLJ8l.js.map
